WorkspaceHint: Absolute path to the project repo/folder. This is where .claude/ is loaded and .agents/automations.json is read.
MembersHint: Members are used to assign tickets. Automations target a member by slug (assigneeSlug field).
ColumnsHint: Kanban columns. Order is set via up/down arrows.
FallbackModelHint: When an automation hits its model's usage limit (e.g. Sonnet weekly cap), the run is automatically retried with this model. Leave disabled to skip the fallback.
DeleteProjectWarning: All tickets and associated data will be permanently deleted. The workspace folder on disk is NOT deleted.
RunnersHint: Configure which AI runner to use for this project. Per-ticket overrides are set in the ticket drawer.
DefaultRunnerHint: This runner will be used for all new agent runs unless overridden per-ticket.
OpenCodeServerModeHint: Connect to an OpenCode server instead of using the CLI directly.
LargeContextWarning: Large context — consider truncating or using a stronger model
MediumContextWarning: Medium context — consider a stronger model if this fails
